folio.label: 194r
folio.l: Is in ©oure court , and many a losengeour
That plesen ©ow wel more , be my feitú
Than he that sootúfastnesse , vn to ©ow seitú
Redetú Ecclesiast , of flaterie
Betú war ©e lordes , of here trecherie
¢ This Chauntecler stod hye , vp oon his toos
Strecchynge his nekke , & helde hise eyen cloos
And gan to crowe loude , for the nones
And daun Russel the fox , stirt vp at ones
And by the gargat , hente Chauntecler
And on his bak , vn to the wode úi~ beer
For ©et ne was æäe noman , æ úi~ sewid
O destynee , æ may nat ben eschewed
Allas that Chauntecler , fley fro the beemes
Allas his wyf , ne rougúte nat of dreemes
And on a friday , fel al this meschaunce
¢ O venus , æat art goddesse of plesaunce
Syn æ thyn servau~t , was this Chauntecleer
And in thy seruyce , dyd al his power
More for delyt than world to multiplie
Why woltow suffre úi~ , on thy day to dye
¢ O Gaufreed , deere Maister , souereyn
That whan thy worthy kyngö , Richard was slayn
Witú shot compleynedest , his deetú so sore
Why ne had I now , thy science & thy lore
The friday for to chide , as deden ©e
For on a friday sootúly , slayn was he
Than wolde I shewe how , æ I coude pleyne
For Chauntecleres drede , & for his peyne
Certes swicú cry , ne lamentaciou~
Was neuäe of ladies mad , whan yliou~
Was wonne , & Pirrus w his streite swerd
Whan he had hente , kyngö Péamë by the berd
And slayn úi~ , as seitú vs Eneydes
As maden alle the hennes , in the cloos
Whan they had seyn , of Chauntecleer the sigúte
But souäeynly , Dame Pertelote shrigúte
Ful loudere , than dede , hasdrubales wyf
Whan æ hire housbonde , hadde I lost his lyf

note.notetxt: 544 There is a small cross in the left margin. RJ

folio.l: And æ the Romaynes , hadden brent Cartage
She was so ful of tåment , and of rage
That wilfully , in to the fyr she stirte
And brent hire seluen , w a stedfast herte
